SERVER.DESCRIPTION: Manage game servers of this guild
SERVER.OPT_ROOTSERVER: Rootserver (where the gameserver will be created)
SERVER.OPT_RAM: RAM limit in MB (empty = no limit)
SERVER.OPT_DISK: Disk limit in GB (empty = no limit)
SERVER.OPT_FILTER_ROOTSERVER: Only servers of a specific rootserver
SERVER.CREATE_HINT: Once the daemon finishes installation, start it with `/server start`.
